title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FurnitureMart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
